mapper.select:
SELECT c.id AS id, c.contract_type AS contractType, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.products_name AS productsName, c.company_name AS companyName, c.total_number AS totalNumber, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.dealed_amount AS dealedAmount, c.contract_status AS contractStatus, c.pay_full_time AS payFullTime, c.pay_bond_time AS payBondTime, c.contract_time AS contractTime, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.our_company_name AS ourCompanyName, c.dept_id AS deptId, c.confirm_receive_number AS confirmReceiveNumber, c.warehouse_number AS warehouseNumber, c.business_type AS businessType, c.confirm_date AS confirmDate, c.delivery_mode AS deliveryMode, c.picc_push_flg AS piccPushFlg, c.picc_message As piccMessage, c.picc_receive_flg As piccReceiveFlg, c.picc_receive_message As piccReceiveMessage, r.payed_amount AS payedAmount, r.receive_date AS receiveDate, r. STATUS AS STATUS, r.receive_amount AS receiveAmount, i.deal_amount AS dealAmount, t.content AS exitContractText, IF(DATEDIFF((IFNULL((SELECT MAX(re.receive_date) FROM t_apply_receive re WHERE re.contract_id = c.id),NOW())),c.pay_full_time) >0,c.total_amount-r.receive_amount,0) AS overdueAmount, c.source FROM t_ctr_contract AS c LEFT JOIN t_apply_receive AS r ON c.id = r.contract_id LEFT JOIN t_apply_invoice AS i ON c.id = i.contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_text AS t ON c.id = t.ctr_contract_id WHERE c.contract_status != 'C' AND c.business_type != '' AND c.credit_flg = true AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY c.contract_time DESC
ORDER BY c.contract_time ASC
ORDER BY c.contract_time DESC
